# Topics:
+ How to implement stata and quarto in a reproducible way
+ How to push code to GitHub
  + Review 

# Project Structure
project/
  data/
    raw/
    processed/
  code/
    00_master.do
    01_clean.do
    02_analysis.do
    03_figures.do
    04_tables.do
  results/
    figures/
    tables/
  writing/
    manuscript.qmd
  _quarto.yml

# Steps

1. Create a stata project (.stpr)

Go File > New > Project... 

Save <project_name>.stpr in the directory you want to work in.

This will create the project file and opens the Project Manager panel.

where you want to save your project.
